assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id/activity returns 401 when the request is unauthenticated
assertionResults.title: returns 401 when the request is unauthenticated

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id/activity returns 403 when the user is not a board member
assertionResults.title: returns 403 when the user is not a board member

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id/activity returns activity events in reverse chronological order for authenticated board members
assertionResults.title: returns activity events in reverse chronological order for authenticated board members

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id/activity/preview returns events in reverse chronological order without requiring authentication
assertionResults.title: returns events in reverse chronological order without requiring authentication

assertionResults.fullName: PATCH /cards/:id/move creates an ActivityEvent in the same transaction when a card is moved
assertionResults.title: creates an ActivityEvent in the same transaction when a card is moved

assertionResults.fullName: PATCH /cards/:id/move returns 404 when the target list does not exist and rolls back cleanly
assertionResults.title: returns 404 when the target list does not exist and rolls back cleanly

assertionResults.fullName: PATCH /cards/:id/move returns 401 when unauthenticated
assertionResults.title: returns 401 when unauthenticated

assertionResults.fullName: PATCH /cards/:id/move returns 404 when the card does not exist
assertionResults.title: returns 404 when the card does not exist

assertionResults.fullName: GET /cards/:id returns 401 when unauthenticated
assertionResults.title: returns 401 when unauthenticated

assertionResults.fullName: GET /cards/:id returns 404 when card not found
assertionResults.title: returns 404 when card not found

assertionResults.fullName: GET /cards/:id returns card with comments and labels
assertionResults.title: returns card with comments and labels

assertionResults.fullName: POST /cards returns 401 when unauthenticated
assertionResults.title: returns 401 when unauthenticated

assertionResults.fullName: POST /cards creates a card and returns 201
assertionResults.title: creates a card and returns 201

assertionResults.fullName: DELETE /cards/:id returns 401 when unauthenticated
assertionResults.title: returns 401 when unauthenticated

assertionResults.fullName: DELETE /cards/:id deletes a card and returns ok
assertionResults.title: deletes a card and returns ok

assertionResults.title: returns 401 when unauthenticated

assertionResults.fullName: POST /cards/:id/comments creates a comment and returns 201
assertionResults.title: creates a comment and returns 201

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards returns 401 when unauthenticated
assertionResults.title: returns 401 when unauthenticated

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards returns boards for the authenticated user
assertionResults.title: returns boards for the authenticated user

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id returns 401 when unauthenticated
assertionResults.title: returns 401 when unauthenticated

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id returns 403 when not a board member
assertionResults.title: returns 403 when not a board member

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id returns 404 when board not found
assertionResults.title: returns 404 when board not found

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id returns board with lists and cards
assertionResults.title: returns board with lists and cards

assertionResults.title: returns 401 when unauthenticated

assertionResults.fullName: POST /boards creates a board and adds creator as owner
assertionResults.title: creates a board and adds creator as owner

assertionResults.fullName: POST /users/register creates a user and does not expose the password
assertionResults.title: creates a user and does not expose the password

assertionResults.fullName: POST /users/login returns 401 for unknown email
assertionResults.title: returns 401 for unknown email

assertionResults.fullName: POST /users/login returns a JWT token on valid credentials
assertionResults.title: returns a JWT token on valid credentials

assertionResults.fullName: GET /users/:id returns 404 when user not found
assertionResults.title: returns 404 when user not found
